mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase discount rates for equity valuations, directly compressing forward S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show positive mean during rate hikes with p-value < 0.05, or Rank IC exceeds 0.05 in tightening periods.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate crossing above 4.0 percent signals labor market deterioration that reduces corporate earnings expectations, driving negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in > 65% of months where UNRATE exceeds 4.0, or rolling Rank IC stays below 0.02 over 3 years.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real stock prices reflect strong consumer wealth effects that boost aggregate demand, generating positive short-term momentum in equity markets over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in > 55% of high RSAFS observations, or autocorrelation of returns drops below 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth exceeding 0.5 percent month-over-month indicates robust manufacturing output that supports corporate revenue growth, yielding positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in > 60% of triggered months, or Rank IC remains below 0.03 across all recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous high inflation and elevated policy rates create a restrictive financial environment that suppresses equity valuations, producing negative forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in > 60% of instances when both proxies exceed thresholds, or interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Weak nonfarm payrolls growth combined with rising unemployment indicates a broad labor market slowdown that reduces consumer spending forecasts, driving negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in > 65% of triggered observations, or the joint predictor fails to improve out-of-sample R-squared by > 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts exceeding 1.4 million units signal strong residential investment demand that amplifies economic growth expectations, generating positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in > 55% of triggered months, or the housing-GDP interaction coefficient becomes insignificant in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production alongside rising consumer prices indicates supply-side bottlenecks that compress profit margins, resulting in negative short-term equity returns over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in > 60% of triggered instances, or the supply-demand divergence signal yields Rank IC < 0.03 over rolling windows.
